calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Jul-07-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Hearing On Claim Of Exemption of Bryan Thomasson is Off calendar. The court has been informed that defendant filed for bankruptcy. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-03-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for the Plaintiff Branch Banking and Trust Company.
Order waiving live testimony of witness was in file.
No appearance by defendant Brian K. Thomasson.
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages/Principal - $30,771.38
Prejudgment Interest - $6,008.64
Attorney's Fees - $4,615.70
Costs - $477.50
Total $41,873.22
Judgment was submitted and signed in open court.

Ntc Of Prove-Up Hearing
